headline: Crypto Stocks Tumble on News of Clarity Act Deal
summary: Crypto stocks fell on Tuesday after reports of a compromise on legislation that would ban stablecoin rewards on platforms like Coinbase except in some specific instances.  Circle Internet Group, the issuer of the second-largest stablecoin by circulation, USDC, plunged 20%, its largest decline on record.  Coinbase, which is the country’s largest crypto exchange, previously pulled its support for the legislation, which is intended to set a framework for regulating the crypto industry.
